question: Will Brazil win the FIFA World Cup by the end of 2050?
resolution_criteria:
2050 World Cup is included to this resolution. 

FIFA World Cup is considered the official tournament hosted under FIFA.

If any World Cup prior of 2050 is moved after 2050 it does not count
background: Brazil currently holds the most number of wins of the [FIFA world cup](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/FIFA_World_Cup) with a total of 5 titles. The last title was in 2002. Since then, the highest placement has been the fourth place, which occurred in the 2014 world cup hosted in Brazil.
